tool.name: Phenograph Clustering GPU [SPAC] [DMAP]
tool.description: GPU-accelerated PhenoGraph clustering using RAPIDS (grapheno backend). For large datasets (>~500K cells) where CPU is too slow.
tool.command:
## NOTE ON CONTAINER ARCHITECTURE ## ============================================================== ## nciccbr/spac-gpu:v1.0.1 ships two conda envs because RAPIDS 22.08 ## pins numpy/pandas versions incompatible with anndata: ## ## preprocess env : anndata + pandas 1.5 + numpy 1.26 ## rapids env : cuml 22.08 + cugraph 22.08 ## ## The /opt/spac-gpu/run_gpu.sh orchestrator handles env switching ## and shuttles intermediates (features.npy, adata.pickle, cluster ## labels) between the two envs via files on disk. Do NOT call ## `run_from_json` directly — that only works under RAPIDS 24.10+ ## in a single env, which we do not yet target. ## ==============================================================
echo '{"analysis": {"type": "file", "name": "output.pickle"}}' > outputs_config.json && python '$__tool_directory__/format_values.py' 'galaxy_params.json' 'cleaned_params.json' --bool-values Profiling --list-values Resolution_List --inject-outputs --outputs-config outputs_config.json && bash /opt/spac-gpu/run_gpu.sh 'cleaned_params.json'

param.name: Upstream_Analysis
param.label: Upstream Analysis
param.help: Link to prior processed dataset in the analysis.

param.name: Table_to_Process
param.label: Table to Process
param.help: Source table. The default 'Original' uses the raw dataset.

param.name: Seed
param.label: Seed
param.help: Random seed forwarded to cugraph.leiden (RAPIDS 24.x only).

param.name: Resolution_Parameter
param.label: Resolution Parameter
param.help: Leiden resolution. Higher values produce more clusters.

param.name: Output_Annotation_Name
param.label: Output Annotation Name
param.help: Annotation column name added to adata.obs. In profiling mode, per-resolution columns are named '{name}-{k}-{resolution}'.

param.name: Number_of_Iterations
param.label: Number of Iterations
param.help: Leiden iterations (passed as max_iter on cugraph 24.x; ignored with a warning on 22.08).

param.name: Profiling
param.label: Profiling
param.help: If enabled, run Leiden at each resolution in the list. KNN and Jaccard are computed once and reused.

param.name: value
param.label: Value
param.help: A resolution value (e.g., 0.3). Add one entry per resolution to sweep.

tool.help:
**Phenograph Clustering GPU [SPAC] [DMAP]**
GPU-accelerated PhenoGraph using the grapheno algorithm (NVIDIA RAPIDS cuml + cugraph). Three-step GPU pipeline: Dask KNN -> Jaccard similarity -> Leiden community detection, plus sort_by_size relabeling.
**When to use GPU vs CPU**
- < 500K cells: CPU is fine - 500K - 5M cells: GPU recommended - > 5M cells: GPU required
**Profiling mode**
When enabled, runs Leiden at each resolution in the Resolution List, reusing the expensive KNN and Jaccard computations across resolutions. For N resolutions this saves (N-1) times the KNN+Jaccard cost.
**GPU instance sizing**
- A10G (24 GB): up to ~2M cells - A100 (80 GB): up to ~15M cells
**Outputs**
- analysis: pickle file containing the AnnData object with cluster labels in ``adata.obs`` and provenance in ``adata.uns['phenograph_clustering_gpu']``.
